webServer.command: npm run build && npm run preview -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4174

specs.title: TF-FIRST-PROJECT creates and cancels through the actual dialog
TF-COMPOSE changes pack, slot, and visible pixels
TF-EDIT-COMPOSITION clears, replaces, and inspects provenance
TF-THEME applies, validates, overrides, and resets semantic tokens
TF-PREVIEW controls animation, direction, pause, speed, and zoom
TF-SAVE-REOPEN restores the exact recipe and supports rename
TF-EXPORT-GENERIC downloads and validates the portable contract
TF-EXPORT-GODOT downloads matching Godot 4 resources
TF-INSPECT-CREDITS tracks only currently selected sources
TF-RECOVER blocks incomplete export and restores safe defaults
TF-SECOND-PACK uses the same workflow and export contract
TF-KEYBOARD-JOURNEY completes the core route without pointer interaction
TF-WEB-PROJECT-LIBRARY and TF-WEB-AUTOSAVE-REOPEN persist multiple projects
TF-WEB-BACKUP-RESTORE clears storage and restores a verified archive
TF-WEB-SNAPSHOT-RESTORE restores a selected recovery point
TF-WEB-SAVE-CONFLICT writes nothing stale and can save a copy
TF-WEB-LEGACY-MIGRATION migrates once and preserves semantic output
TF-WEB-OFFLINE reloads the installed shell and local project without network
TF-WEB-LEGACY-MIGRATION exposes Retry, recovery download, and continue on failure
TF-WEB-PROJECT-LIBRARY requires the exact name before deleting a project
TF-WEB-STORAGE-PRESSURE previews safe cleanup and keeps backup available
TF-WEB-BACKUP-RESTORE inspects and resolves an existing-ID import conflict
QS-006 keeps recovery controls keyboard-operable at constrained 200%-equivalent reflow
